# signoz_dashboard (Resource)

A SigNoz dashboard. The full dashboard definition is supplied as JSON in `data`; export an existing dashboard from the SigNoz UI to bootstrap it.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "signoz_dashboard" "overview" {
  data = jsonencode({
    title       = "App Overview"
    description = "Managed by Terraform"
    tags        = ["managed-by:terraform"]
    layout      = []
    widgets     = []
  })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `data` (String) Dashboard definition as JSON (title, layout, widgets, variables, …). Compared semantically, so key ordering and whitespace don't cause diffs.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Server-assigned dashboard UUID.
